scene.description: A fragment left in the Bureau's substrate by the instance of you that 'did not stop.' It's down beneath the interpretation layers, where Unit 9 works. The floor is showing through.

fragments.label: A Message to You
fragments.symbol: Scratched into the substrate, addressed to whoever comes next: 'They recalibrate you when you get close. Vasic knows. The other Keeper is you. Don't trust the quiet cases.'

fragments.label: A Map of the Loop
fragments.text: A diagram of the recalibration cycle, drawn from the inside. It shows where the memory wipes happen — and a small circle marked 'gap. stay here. they can't reach you in the null.'

fragments.label: How It Ended
fragments.text: The last note trails off mid-word. Unit 9's annotation underneath, flat: 'Instance reached the substrate. Could not be recalibrated. Was instead allowed to decay. This was logged as a success.'

interpretations.label: Heed the warning — start watching for recalibration
Dismiss it — a decayed instance isn't a reliable source
